title: Famous Places of India
description: A travel and landmarks round featuring monuments, cities, rivers, temples, and iconic destinations across India.

questions.prompt: In which city is the Taj Mahal located?
questions.hint: It is in Uttar Pradesh.

questions.prompt: Which monument in Delhi was commissioned by Qutb-ud-din Aibak?
questions.hint: It is a tall minaret and a UNESCO site.

questions.prompt: Which temple in Odisha is famously shaped like a chariot?
questions.hint: It is dedicated to the Sun God.

questions.prompt: Which city is known as the City of Lakes in Rajasthan?
questions.hint: It is a popular wedding destination.

questions.prompt: Which fort in Rajasthan is associated with the city of Jaipur?
questions.hint: It is built with yellow and pink sandstone.

questions.prompt: Which river is considered the holiest by many Hindus?
questions.hint: It flows through Varanasi.

questions.prompt: Which city is known as the Queen of the Hills in West Bengal?
questions.hint: It is famous for tea gardens and toy train rides.

questions.prompt: Which famous gate in Mumbai overlooks the Arabian Sea?
questions.hint: It was built to commemorate the visit of King George V.

questions.prompt: Which monument in Hyderabad has four minarets?
questions.hint: It is one of the city's most famous landmarks.

questions.prompt: In which state would you find the backwaters of Alleppey?
questions.hint: It is famous for houseboats.

questions.prompt: Which palace in Mysuru is illuminated during Dussehra celebrations?
questions.hint: It is one of Karnataka's most famous attractions.

questions.prompt: Which national park in Assam is famous for the one-horned rhinoceros?
questions.hint: It is a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

questions.prompt: Which lake city is the summer capital of Jammu and Kashmir and famous for Dal Lake?
questions.hint: Its name starts with S.

questions.prompt: Which temple town in Tamil Nadu is famous for the Meenakshi Amman Temple?
questions.hint: Its name starts with M.

questions.prompt: Which hill station in Himachal Pradesh is famous for the Mall Road and Jakhoo Temple?
questions.hint: It was once the summer capital of British India.

questions.prompt: Which caves in Maharashtra are famous for ancient Buddhist paintings?
questions.hint: Their name starts with A.

questions.prompt: Which desert covers much of western Rajasthan?
questions.hint: Its name starts with T.

questions.prompt: Which city in Punjab is home to the Golden Temple?
questions.hint: It shares its name with the temple district.

questions.prompt: Which island monument near Mumbai is famous for rock-cut caves dedicated to Shiva?
questions.hint: Its name starts with E.

questions.prompt: Which city in Uttar Pradesh is famous for the ghats and the Kashi Vishwanath Temple?
questions.hint: It is one of the oldest living cities in the world.

questions.prompt: Which beach destination in Goa is famous for its nightlife and starts with B?
questions.hint: It is one of Goa's most well-known beaches.

questions.prompt: Which monument in New Delhi is a war memorial shaped like a triumphal arch?
questions.hint: It is on the Rajpath area.

questions.prompt: Which massive fort in Delhi was built by Shah Jahan and hosts the Independence Day flag hoisting?
questions.hint: Its name is a color.

questions.prompt: Which temple in Amritsar is the holiest shrine of Sikhism?
questions.hint: Its popular name refers to its appearance.

questions.prompt: Which ancient rock-cut cave complex in Maharashtra is famous for Hindu, Buddhist, and Jain monuments and starts with E?
questions.hint: It shares its name with a famous island cave site near Mumbai but is not the same.

questions.prompt: Which city in Karnataka is called the Garden City of India?
questions.hint: It is also the state's capital.

questions.prompt: Which city in Rajasthan is known as the Blue City?
questions.hint: Mehrangarh Fort is there.

questions.prompt: Which temple in Jammu is famous for the pilgrimage to Mata Vaishno Devi?
questions.hint: It is in the Trikuta hills.

questions.prompt: Which palace complex in Rajasthan is located in Udaipur and overlooks Lake Pichola?
questions.hint: It is called the City what.

questions.prompt: Which bridge in Kolkata is an iconic cantilever bridge over the Hooghly River?
questions.hint: It shares its name with a station area.

questions.prompt: Which beach in Odisha is famous for the annual sand art festival and nearby Jagannath pilgrimage city?
questions.hint: It is in Puri.

questions.prompt: Which temple town in Odisha is famous for the Jagannath Temple?
questions.hint: It starts with P.

questions.prompt: Which famous stepwell in Gujarat is a UNESCO site and named after a queen?
questions.hint: It begins with Rani.

questions.prompt: Which temple complex in Tamil Nadu is associated with Ramanathaswamy and is on an island town?
questions.hint: It is part of the Char Dham pilgrimage.

questions.prompt: Which monastery region in Ladakh is famous for Pangong Lake nearby and high-altitude landscapes?
questions.hint: Its name starts with L.

questions.prompt: Which Kerala hill station is famous for tea gardens and often called the Kashmir of South India?
questions.hint: Its name starts with M.

questions.prompt: Which city in Bihar is associated with the Mahabodhi Temple where Buddha attained enlightenment?
questions.hint: Its name begins with Bodh.

questions.prompt: Which fort in Maharashtra was the capital fort of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj?
questions.hint: His coronation took place there.

questions.prompt: Which pilgrimage city in Uttarakhand is famous for Har Ki Pauri?
questions.hint: The Kumbh Mela is held there.

questions.prompt: Which Himalayan region in Himachal Pradesh is famous for Rohtang Pass and Solang Valley?
questions.hint: Its name starts with M.

questions.prompt: Which city in Madhya Pradesh is famous for the Khajuraho Group of Monuments nearby?
questions.hint: Its name starts with K.

questions.prompt: Which city in Rajasthan is called the Golden City because of its yellow sandstone architecture?
questions.hint: It has a famous fort in the desert.

questions.prompt: Which temple in Andhra Pradesh is one of the richest pilgrimage sites in the world and dedicated to Lord Venkateswara?
questions.hint: It is in Tirumala hills.

questions.prompt: Which city in Kerala is known as the Queen of the Arabian Sea?
questions.hint: It has Chinese fishing nets.

questions.prompt: Which famous bird sanctuary in Rajasthan is a UNESCO site formerly called Bharatpur Bird Sanctuary?
questions.hint: Its current name begins with Keoladeo.

questions.prompt: Which city in Tamil Nadu is famous for the Brihadeeswarar Temple?
questions.hint: It was a Chola capital.

questions.prompt: Which riverfront city in Gujarat is known for Sabarmati Ashram?
questions.hint: It hosted a famous cricket stadium too.

questions.prompt: Which cave shrine in Jammu and Kashmir is dedicated to Shiva and famous for an ice stalagmite?
questions.hint: Its name starts with A.

questions.prompt: Which northeastern state is home to Tawang Monastery?
questions.hint: Its capital is Itanagar.

questions.prompt: Which city in Maharashtra is famous for the rock-cut Buddhist chaitya halls of Karla and Bhaja nearby and is a hill getaway from Mumbai?
questions.hint: Its name starts with L.
